# QP Hub

> QP Hub is an educational platform for students and educators to upload, browse and download past question papers across boards, classes and subjects.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of QP Hub with personalized recommendations and trending papers.
- [Browse](/browse): Search and filter past question papers by board, class, subject, year and exam type.
- [Upload](/upload): Contribute question papers to the community.
- [Requests](/requests): Browse and create requests for question papers and answer keys.
- [Calendar](/calendar): Upcoming exam events and personal study calendar.
- [Study Groups](/groups): Real-time chat groups with shared paper collections.
- [Study Plan](/study-plan): Generate a personalized study schedule.

## Optional

- [Sign in](/auth): Account creation and login.
